items.title: gotta say Codex is completely unrecognizable from 3 months ago.
items.title_zh: 不得不说，从 3 个月前开始，Codex 已经完全无法识别了。
items.description: gotta say Codex is completely unrecognizable from 3 months ago. guys went extreme founder mode on this thing @gabrielchua was demoing this and i was like “you guys have agentic excel on mac” https://t.co/khrZiOvZp9 https://t.co/Nmg13LdLqu
items.description_zh: 不得不说，从 3 个月前开始，Codex 已经完全无法识别了。伙计们在这件事上采取了极端创始人模式 @gabrielchua 正在演示这个，我就像“你们在 mac 上有代理 excel” https://t.co/khrZiOvZp9 https://t.co/Nmg13LdLqu

items.title: This is a really great update.
items.title_zh: 这是一次非常棒的更新。
items.description: This is a really great update. I just don't want my financial data to be used to train models or get targeted ads, so I turned "improve the model for everyone" off Doesn't appear there's a "Use for ad targeting" toggle here so I'll assume…
items.description_zh: 这是一次非常棒的更新。我只是不希望我的财务数据被用来训练模型或获得有针对性的广告，所以我关闭了“为每个人改进模型”这里似乎没有“用于广告定位”切换，所以我假设......

items.title: A generation of PMs is struggling to adapt to AI because they were trained to execute pla…
items.title_zh: 一代产品经理正在努力适应人工智能，因为他们接受过执行计划的培训……
items.description: A generation of PMs is struggling to adapt to AI because they were trained to execute playbooks. AI requires inventing them. For two decades, a few teams invented the product patterns. Everyone else repurposed them to their domain. That ma…
items.description_zh: 一代产品经理正在努力适应人工智能，因为他们接受过执行剧本的培训。人工智能需要发明它们。二十年来，一些团队发明了产品模式。其他人都将它们重新调整到自己的领域。那个妈……

items.title: Grok CLI has great support for Plugins and Skills.
items.title_zh: Grok CLI 对插件和技能有很好的支持。
items.description: Grok CLI has great support for Plugins and Skills. Installing the Vercel Plugin gives Grok cloud deployment superpowers. Watch this creative coding website be generated with Grok and hosted seamlessly on Vercel ↓ https://t.co/VpA5FqmkOO ht…
items.description_zh: Grok CLI 对插件和技能有很好的支持。安装 Vercel 插件赋予 Grok 云部署超能力。观看这个使用 Grok 生成并在 Vercel 上无缝托管的创意编码网站 ↓ https://t.co/VpA5FqmkOO ht...

items.title: Vercel protects your agents' deployments behind SSO like @Okta.
items.title_zh: Vercel 可以像 @Okta 一样保护您的代理在 SSO 后面的部署。
items.description: Vercel protects your agents' deployments behind SSO like @Okta. Even Production ones, giving you a secure 'intranet' of apps generated with @v0, Codex, Claude, etc. It's all fun and games until your agent gets 𝟺𝟶𝟷 𝚄𝚗𝚊𝚞𝚝𝚑𝚘𝚛𝚒𝚣𝚎…
items.description_zh: Vercel 可以像 @Okta 一样保护您的代理在 SSO 后面的部署。即使是生产应用程序，也可以为您提供使用 @v0、Codex、Claude 等生成的应用程序的安全“内联网”。这一切都很有趣，直到您的代理获得 𝟺𝟶𝟷 𝚄𝚗𝚊𝚞𝚝𝚑𝚘𝚛𝚒𝚣𝚎…

items.title: If you become exceptional at managing agents, but are also exceptional in your understand…
items.title_zh: 如果您在管理代理方面变得出色，而且在理解方面也非常出色……
items.description: If you become exceptional at managing agents, but are also exceptional in your understanding of the fundamentals, you will be unstoppable. We all prefer to work with masters of their craft. What’s new: you can’t afford to miss out on the a…
items.description_zh: 如果您在管理代理方面变得出色，而且对基本原理的理解也非常出色，那么您将势不可挡。我们都喜欢与他们的工艺大师一起工作。最新消息：您不能错过……

items.title: I’m fully forward deployed engineering pilled specifically because AI simply is not the s…
items.title_zh: 我完全向前部署工程，特别是因为人工智能根本不是……
items.description: I’m fully forward deployed engineering pilled specifically because AI simply is not the same as software. In software, you deliver a stable piece of technology to a customer and they adopt it and that’s that (extreme over simplification).…
items.description_zh: 我完全向前部署工程，特别是因为人工智能与软件不同。在软件中，您向客户提供一项稳定的技术，他们会采用它，就是这样（极端过度简化）......

items.title: The Overpaid CEO tax doesn't tax overpaid CEOs, and all it does is pass higher gross rece…
items.title_zh: 薪酬过高的首席执行官税不会对薪酬过高的首席执行官征税，它所做的只是通过更高的总收入……
items.description: The Overpaid CEO tax doesn't tax overpaid CEOs, and all it does is pass higher gross receipts taxes on to consumers AND it will result in way lower revenue for the city, same as the CA asset seizure tax by SEIU. Bad anti-business policy th…
items.description_zh: 薪酬过高的首席执行官税不会对薪酬过高的首席执行官征税，它所做的只是将更高的总收入税转嫁给消费者，这将导致该市的收入大幅下降，就像 SEIU 征收的加州资产扣押税一样。糟糕的反商业政策……

items.title: It's time to vote in California elections and here is my voter guide.
